comments: Information of tracklisting from Hal C F Astell's website.
Tommy doesn't begin the show (is that Richard Skinner?) but does take over after the Iron Maiden set, which had been originally scheduled for broadcast the previous week.

Tommy will be sitting in for Alan Freeman on the next Saturday Rock Show, for the last of three weeks. He mentions that Guns N' Roses' "Patience" had been released that week; it was released on 19th June, charting w/e 1st July (but first broadcast on Sunday 25th June) so this is, in fact, 23rd June.

track_listing.details: LP-Gretchen Goes To Nebraska; Atlantic / Megaforce Worldwide
